task: Close out Epic 07 and activate engine-aware overview epic
acceptance_criteria: Post-Epic-07 roadmap extension is explicit and the full engine-aware overview epic skeleton exists
validation_command: bash -lc \grep -q 'Engine-Aware Overview and Fleet Diagnostics' EPIC_ROADMAP.md && test -f .codex-tasks/20260420-engine-aware-overview-epic/EPIC.md && test -f .codex-tasks/20260420-engine-aware-overview-epic/SUBTASKS.csv && test -f .codex-tasks/20260420-engine-aware-overview-epic/PROGRESS.md\""
notes: Epic 07 close-out review is complete, the roadmap is extended, and the new active epic is fully materialized before any child implementation

acceptance_criteria: Current MySQL-first overview contract seams are explicit and the approved engine-aware overview payload boundary is frozen
notes: Closed by exposing `engine` on overview instances, freezing honest mixed-engine non-goals, and passing focused pytest, integration, typecheck, and OpenAPI gates

task: Implement mixed-engine overview aggregation and analytics API
acceptance_criteria: Analytics overview route returns engine-aware fleet snapshots and mixed-engine diagnostics without regressing MySQL behavior
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/api/analytics tests/integration/analytics_queries && pnpm openapi:check
notes: Closed by adding engine-aware summary and coverage semantics to the overview API while preserving the current MySQL cards/charts baseline and passing focused backend gates

task: Implement engine-aware web overview surface and fleet messaging
acceptance_criteria: Overview page, dashboard model, and fleet messaging reflect the supported mixed-engine surface instead of MySQL-first copy
validation_command: pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter web typecheck
notes: Closed by wiring overview coverage/engine summary into the dashboard model, updating overview and instances copy, and passing web tests and typecheck

task: Deepen diagnostics and preset semantics for mixed-engine fleets
acceptance_criteria: Capacity leaders, diagnostics readouts, preview fixtures, and presets expose engine-aware baseline semantics without overclaiming parity
validation_command: pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter web build
notes: Closed by aligning presets and overview guidance copy with the coverage-aware baseline while preserving the scope-aware leader semantics introduced in child #4

acceptance_criteria: Repo-root signoff passes with backend, web, smoke, and Oracle live-gate evidence for the overview baseline
validation_command: pnpm openapi:check && uv run pytest tests/api/analytics tests/integration/analytics_queries tests/integration/metrics_pipeline tests/integration/control_plane && pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm smoke && pnpm test:control-plane:oracle
notes: Closed after full repo-root signoff passed; the only signoff fix needed was tightening a noisy smoke selector to exact-match the Fleet summary heading
